_description: Bulgarian Cooolbox (Кулбокс АД) internet-service invoice (Фактура 9000407074, 02.07.2026), a text-layer PDF. TAX-EXCLUSIVE / net-priced: the single line 'Месечна такса ... cooolNet' is the 11.89 net (Стойност/Net Amount); VAT is added on top (Сума ДДС / VAT Amount 2.38) to reach the 14.27 grand total (Общо дължима сума / Total Due). Motivates the tax-on-top fix — the app must read tax=2.38 + total=14.27 so it can fold the VAT into the line price instead of saving the 11.89 net.
_image: receipt.pdf here is the real invoice (gitignored — personal data).
_subtotalNote: Data base / Данъчна основа is 11.89 (= the net line). subtotal 11.89 or 0 are both acceptable, so it isn't asserted here.
